授業方法: This course is conducted face-to-face over five consecutive days. Students work in pairs and small groups to complete a variety of discussion, research, and presentation activities. The course culminates in the creation and presentation of an academic poster based on data students have collected and analysed. All activities are conducted in English, encouraging active participation and immersive language use.

【Startup Week】URL: https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=0c004fc2-9615-46a2-a8d3-b41a002a4fa2
